response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings roughly 20 years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial spirit through GISCollective and several early-stage startups, but falls well short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI involvement is very recent and narrow—MCP tooling at his current role—with no demonstrated history of building recognized AI-powered products or platforms at scale, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy at an organizational level. The role requires a recognized AI thought leader with deep cloud platform expertise; the resume reads as a strong, hands-on generalist engineer.
strengths: ~20 years of diverse engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with consistent staff/senior-level progression
Genuine entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) and held early-stage roles at WatchUp and Apon
Current role involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, demonstrating active engagement with agentic workflows
concerns: AI expertise is recent and narrow—no history of shipping recognized AI-powered products or platforms at meaningful scale
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; education does not meet preferred qualifications for a director-level AI strategy IC
No demonstrated experience in strategic customer advising, external thought leadership, or the organizational influence expected at director level

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering depth and entrepreneurial experience
